instruction: How can I update an output sheet in Excel to display the Job Title, contact details, and Email Address of a person when their Job Title matches either 'Branch Manager' or 'Branch Credit Manager' for a given Branch Location, while marking cells with 'N/A' if the Job Title is different? The data to be matched comes from an employee data sheet containing fields such as Employee Name, Phone Number, Email Address, and Job Title. The output is required in a structured format where the person's Employee Name is listed against their Branch Location, accompanied by Phone Number and Email Address if the Job Title criteria is met. Left align all outputted entries.
